facts.claim: Replika has approximately 30 million registered users globally.
Character.AI reports approximately 20 million monthly active users.
Nomi emphasizes persistent memory and long-term relationship building distinct from single-turn chatbots.
Kindroid markets itself on privacy-preserving architecture with on-device memory options.
Woebot Health received FDA De Novo clearance as a Class II medical device for postpartum depression in 2024.
Wysa is used by over 6 million people and has been piloted by NHS trusts in the UK.
facts.source: Wysa and NHS England case studies 2023-2024

facts.claim: Youper applies CBT-inspired conversational prompts and mood tracking, not diagnosis.
facts.source: Youper Health blog and app documentation 2024

facts.claim: Headspace launched Ebb, an AI companion for reflection and emotional check-ins, as a premium feature in 2024.
AI chatbots are not a substitute for professional mental-health care. In crisis call 988 (US) or 3114 (France).
ElliQ (Intuition Robotics) was deployed to 800+ older adults under the New York State Office for the Aging program.
facts.source: New York State Office for the Aging, 2023-2024

facts.claim: The AgeTech market is projected to reach $2 trillion by 2030.
Lovot (Groove X, Japan) is a social robot designed for companionship and deployed in eldercare facilities.
Talkpal positions itself as an AI-first language tutor with conversation-driven lessons.
Duolingo Max uses OpenAI GPT-4 for Roleplay and Explain My Answer features.
Babbel integrates AI conversation practice alongside its live teacher service.
Jasper raised $125M Series A at a $1.5B valuation in October 2022 and has since pivoted toward enterprise.
Copy.ai pivoted from generic copy generation toward go-to-market workflow automation in 2024.
Notion AI is bundled within the Notion Plus/Business plans and uses multiple underlying LLM providers.
Claude by Anthropic supports context windows up to 1 million tokens on Claude Opus 4.7.
The AI companion consumer app market is estimated at $120 million in annual revenue.
The global mental-health app market is estimated at $1.5 billion annually.
Duolingo alone generates approximately $500 million in annual revenue, dominating the language-learning segment.
The AI companion romance segment is estimated at approximately $80 million annual revenue in 2026.
facts.source: Affiliate network aggregated EPC data, CrakRevenue 2026

facts.claim: Candy.ai is a photorealistic AI companion platform with voice, image generation and roleplay features, priced from $12.99/mo.
facts.source: Candy.ai product pages and affiliate network 2026

facts.claim: Secrets.ai emphasizes voice-first AI companion interaction, priced from $14.90/mo.
AI Companion Today evaluates apps on a 12-criteria grid covering conversation, memory, pricing, safety, privacy, voice, image generation, free tier, support, app quality, UX, and editor's choice.
AICT rankings are never influenced by commission size; commercial relationships are documented in our advertising disclosure.
AICT covers seven verticals: companion, mental-health, seniors, language, productivity, romance (age-gated) and gaming.
AICT content is produced by The AICT Editorial Team under collective editorial responsibility.
